summary: Test suite covers core requirements but has critical gaps. Main issues: (1) Bats tests run directly against the script, not through act—violates the explicit requirement that 'ALL TESTS MUST RUN THROUGH ACT.' (2) Missing fixture files (commits-fix.txt, commits-feat.txt, package-2.3.4.json, .actrc) referenced by tests but not provided. (3) run-tests.sh expects workflow to output markers (SCENARIO_FIX_RESULT, etc.) with no indication the workflow defines these outputs. (4) Incomplete edge case coverage: empty commits file, invalid semver validation (code validates but tests don't verify rejection), whitespace handling, changelog section ordering, error message content. (5) Changelog tests don't verify actual commit text appears in output or that sections are in correct order (Breaking Changes → Features → Bug Fixes). Would not reliably catch regressions; critical architectural mismatch between test approaches.
